              -- Each edge contributes at most one new vertex to the support.
              -- Therefore, the length of the support is at most the length of the edges list.
              have h₉ : ∀ (p : LoopWalk u v), (LoopWalk.support p).length ≤ (LoopWalk.edges p).length := by
                intro p
                induction p with
                | nil => simp [LoopWalk.support, LoopWalk.edges]
                | cons h q ih =>
                  simp_all [LoopWalk.support, LoopWalk.edges, List.length, List.map, dartEdge]
                  <;> norm_num <;>
                  (try omega) <;>
                  (try simp_all [List.length, List.map, DartEdge, Sym2.mk, Finset.card_insert_of_not_mem,
                    Finset.mem_singleton])
                  <;>
                  (try omega)
                  <;>
                  (try
                    {
                      simp_all [List.length, List.map, DartEdge, Sym2.mk, Finset.card_insert_of_not_mem,
                        Finset.mem_singleton]
                      <;> omega
                    })
                | loop q =>
                  simp_all [LoopWalk.support, LoopWalk.edges, List.length, List.map, dartEdge]
                  <;> norm_num <;>
                  (try omega) <;>
                  (try simp_all [List.length, List.map, DartEdge, Sym2.mk, Finset.card_insert_of_not_mem,
                    Finset.mem_singleton])
                  <;>
                  (try omega)
                  <;>
                  (try
                    {
                      simp_all [List.length, List.map, DartEdge, Sym2.mk, Finset.card_insert_of_not_mem,
                        Finset.mem_singleton]
                      <;> omega
                    })
              exact h₉ p
            omega
          omega
        exact h₅
      exact h₃
    -- Convert the length of the edges list to the cardinality of the edge set.
    have h₃ : (LoopWalk.edges p).length = (LoopWalk.edges p).toFinset.card + (List.length ((LoopWalk.edges p).toFinset) - (List.length ((LoopWalk.edges p).toFinset))) := by
      simp [List.toFinset_card_of_nodup]
      <;>
      (try omega) <;>
      (try simp_all [List.length, List.map, dartEdge])
      <;>
      (try omega)
      <;>
      (try
        {
          simp_all [List.length, List.map, dartEdge]
          <;> omega
        })
    -- Use the fact that the cardinality of the support set is at most the cardinality of the edge set plus one.
    have h₄ : (LoopWalk.supportSet p).card ≤ (LoopWalk.edgeSet p).card + 1 := by
      have h₅ : (LoopWalk.supportSet p).card = (LoopWalk.support p).toFinset.card := rfl
      have h₆ : (LoopWalk.edgeSet p).card = (LoopWalk.edges p).toFinset.card := rfl
      have h₇ : (LoopWalk.support p).toFinset.card ≤ (LoopWalk.edges p).toFinset.card + 1 := by
        have h₈ : (LoopWalk.support p).card ≤ (LoopWalk.edges p).length + 1 := h₂
        have h₉ : (LoopWalk.support p).toFinset.card ≤ (LoopWalk.support p).card := by
          apply Finset.card_le_of_subset
          intro x hx
          simp_all [Finset.mem_coe]
        have h₁₀ : (LoopWalk.edges p).toFinset.card ≤ (LoopWalk.edges p).length := by
          apply (Finset.card_le_card (Multiset.toFinset_card_le _)).trans
          <;> simp [List.length]
          <;> rfl
        have h₁₁ : (LoopWalk.support p).toFinset.card ≤ (LoopWalk.edges p).length + 1 := by
          linarith
        have h₁₂ : (LoopWalk.edges p).length ≥ (LoopWalk.edges p).toFinset.card := by
          have h₁₃ : (LoopWalk.edges p).toFinset.card ≤ (LoopWalk.edges p).length := by
            apply (Finset.card_le_card (Multiset.toFinset_card_le _)).trans
            <;> simp [List.length]
            <;> rfl
          linarith
        linarith
      simp_all [h₅, h₆]
      <;>
      (try omega) <;>
      (try simp_all [List.length, List.map, dartEdge])
      <;>
      (try omega)
      <;>
      (try
        {
          simp_all [List.length, List.map, dartEdge]
          <;> omega
        })
    exact h₄
  exact h₁
